name: Microwaved Norwegian Baked Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Place apple halves cut side up in an 8-inch microwave-safe dish.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients in a bowl.
3. Spoon equal portions of the mixture over each apple half.
4. Microwave on high for 5 to 6 minutes, rotating the dish after 3 minutes (or use the turntable).
5. Cover with plastic wrap and let stand for 3 minutes.
Note: The cooking time is based on a 650-watt oven. Adjust the time if using an oven with different wattage.
